title: Crunchy Wheat Stir Fry
description: A healthy and easy-to-make dish that combines crunchy vegetables with whole wheat noodles.

ingredients.name: Crunchy vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as broccoli, carrots, bell peppers

instructions: Cook whole wheat noodles according to package instructions.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add crunchy vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add earthy stir fry sauce and stir well.
Combine cooked noodles with the vegetable mixture and season with salt and pepper.
